info.name: Recipes API
info.description: Postman collection for the Recipes CRUD API. Includes sample requests and responses for createRecipe, getAllRecipes, getRecipeById, updateRecipe, and deleteRecipe.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Classic Margherita Pizza",
  "description": "A traditional Italian pizza topped with fresh tomatoes, mozzarella, and basil.",
  "ingredients": [
    "Pizza dough",
    "San Marzano tomatoes",
    "Fresh mozzarella",
    "Fresh basil leaves",
    "Extra virgin olive oil",
    "Salt"
  ],
  "instructions": [
    "Preheat the oven to 250¬įC (480¬įF).",
    "Roll out the pizza dough on a floured surface.",
    "Spread crushed tomatoes evenly over the base.",
    "Add slices of fresh mozzarella.",
    "Bake for 8-10 minutes until the crust is golden.",
    "Top with fresh basil and a drizzle of olive oil before serving."
  ],
  "cuisine": "Italian",
  "prepTimeMinutes": 20,
  "cookTimeMinutes": 10,
  "servings": 2,
  "difficulty": "Medium",
  "author": "Chef Mario"
}

request.description:
Creates a new recipe.

**Endpoint:** `POST /api/recipes`

**Required fields:** `title`, `description`, `ingredients`, `instructions`.

**Success response:** `201 Created`.

query.description: Optional filter by difficulty (Easy, Medium, Hard)

request.description:
Retrieves all recipes. Supports optional query filters: `cuisine`, `difficulty`, and `search` (matches title case-insensitively).

**Endpoint:** `GET /api/recipes`

**Success response:** `200 OK`.

Retrieves a single recipe by its MongoDB ObjectId.

**Endpoint:** `GET /api/recipes/:id`

**Success response:** `200 OK`. **Failure responses:** `400 Bad Request` (invalid ID), `404 Not Found`.

Updates an existing recipe by its ID. Send only the fields you want to change.

**Endpoint:** `PUT /api/recipes/:id`

**Success response:** `200 OK`. **Failure responses:** `400`, `404`.

Deletes a recipe by its ID.

**Endpoint:** `DELETE /api/recipes/:id`

**Success response:** `200 OK`. **Failure responses:** `400`, `404`.
